---
title: "sph 112 measles project"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-27"
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(ggplot2)
library(janitor)
```
## Data Import
```{r}
measles_case_records <- read_xlsx("Utopia_Measles_Dataset.xlsx", "Measles_Case_Records")
annual_trend_2010_2015 <- read_xlsx("Utopia_Measles_Dataset.xlsx", "Annual_Trend_2010_2025")
outbreak_detail <- read_xlsx("Utopia_Measles_Dataset.xlsx", "Outbreak_Detail")
sspe_registry <- read_xlsx("Utopia_Measles_Dataset.xlsx", "SSPE_Registry")
vaccination_coverage <- read_xlsx("Utopia_Measles_Dataset.xlsx", "Vaccination_Coverage")
public_opinion_survery <- read_xlsx("Utopia_Measles_Dataset.xlsx", "Public_Opinion_Survey")
county_geographic_summary <- read_xlsx("Utopia_Measles_Dataset.xlsx", "County_Geographic_Summary")
given_summary_statistics <- read_xlsx("Utopia_Measles_Dataset.xlsx", "Summary_Statistics")
```

## Vaccine opinion by county
```{r}
county_geographic_summary <- clean_names(county_geographic_summary)
county_geographic_summary

```

```{r}
county_geographic_summary |> 
  select(county, pct_pro_vaccine_attitude, pct_vaccine_hesitant) |> 
  pivot_longer(cols = c(pct_vaccine_hesitant, pct_pro_vaccine_attitude),
               names_to = "attitude",
               values_to = "percent") |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(county, percent, decreasing = T), y = percent, fill = attitude))+
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  scale_fill_discrete(labels = c("pct_vaccine_hesitant" = "Vaccine Hesitant",
                                 "pct_pro_vaccine_attitude" = "Pro Vaccine"))+
  coord_flip() +
  labs(y = "Percent of Population", 
       x = "County", 
       fill = "Vaccine Attitude",
       title = "Vaccine Attitudes by County") 
```
